title: BankBazaar is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: BankBazaar is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Join the BankBazaar family as a Full Stack Developer in Patna. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About BankBazaar:
BankBazaar is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in CI/CD

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BankBazaar!
